login.heading: Sign in
login.subheading: Enter your admin password to continue.

totp.title: Two-factor verification
totp.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

bootstrap.title: Complete Remote Setup
bootstrap.subtitle: Remote dashboard access stays locked until an admin password is configured.
bootstrap.body: Use the password setup flow below to bootstrap dashboard access before loading the rest of the admin UI.
bootstrap.tokenConfigured: Enter the configured bootstrap token below with your new password. Depending on your setup, it may come from your server logs or CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN.
bootstrap.tokenMissing: Remote setup is blocked. Set CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN on the server or restart without a password to auto-generate one.

trustedHeader.title: Reverse proxy authentication required
trustedHeader.body: This dashboard expects a trusted auth header from your reverse proxy. Open it through Authelia or configure a fallback dashboard password first.

page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Configure routing, auth, API key management, and firewall.
page.trustedHeaderNotice: Dashboard access is authenticated by a trusted reverse-proxy header. Password and TOTP stay available only as optional fallback login.
page.disabledNotice: Dashboard auth is fully bypassed by configuration. Only use this mode behind network restrictions or external access control.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how the interface looks and how time is displayed.

timeFormat.label: Time format
timeFormat.description: Apply 12h or 24h formatting to datetimes across the dashboard.

accountRows.label: Account rows
accountRows.description: Choose which quota rows appear in compact account views.
accountRows.fiveHourDescription: Show only the 5h quota row when available.
accountRows.weeklyDescription: Show only the weekly quota row.

routing.title: Routing
routing.description: Control how requests are distributed across accounts.

upstream.label: Upstream stream transport
upstream.description: Choose how `codex-lb` connects upstream for streaming responses.

strategy.label: Routing strategy
strategy.description: Choose how requests are distributed across accounts.

stickyThreads.label: Sticky threads
stickyThreads.description: Keep related requests on the same account.

preferEarlier.label: Prefer earlier reset
preferEarlier.description: Bias traffic to accounts with earlier quota reset.

promptCacheTtl.label: Prompt-cache affinity TTL
promptCacheTtl.description: Keep OpenAI-style prompt-cache mappings warm for a bounded number of seconds.

import.title: Import
import.description: Control how account import handles duplicates.

allowDuplicates.label: Allow import without overwrite
allowDuplicates.description: Keep duplicate imports as separate accounts instead of replacing existing ones.

session.title: Session
session.description: Control how long newly issued password-backed dashboard sessions stay signed in.

lifetime.label: Dashboard session lifetime
lifetime.description: Absolute lifetime in hours for new password sessions. Existing sessions keep their original expiry.
lifetime.invalid: Enter a whole number of hours (1 or more). Decimals such as <0>1.5</0> are not accepted.
lifetime.longWarning: Lifetimes over 30 days keep admin sessions valid for a long time. That may be acceptable on a personal laptop, but it increases the impact of a leaked browser profile or stolen cookie.

status.disabled: Password login is disabled by the current dashboard auth mode.
status.fallbackConfigured: Password is configured as an optional fallback.

setupDialog.title: Set password
setupDialog.description: Set a password for dashboard login.
setupDialog.bootstrapTokenConfigured: Remote setup requires the configured bootstrap token (from server logs or CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN).
setupDialog.bootstrapTokenMissing: Remote setup is blocked. Set CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN on the server or restart to auto-generate a token.

changeDialog.title: Change password
changeDialog.description: Enter your current password and a new one.

removeDialog.title: Remove password
removeDialog.description: Confirm your current password to remove it.

verifyDialog.title: Verify password
verifyDialog.description: Enter your password to unlock password and TOTP management.
verifyDialog.totpDescription: Enter your TOTP code to complete verification.

requireLogin.label: Require TOTP on login
requireLogin.description: Prompt for TOTP code after password login.

setupDialog.title: Enable TOTP
setupDialog.description: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the verification code.

disableDialog.title: Disable TOTP
disableDialog.description: Enter your current TOTP code to disable two-factor authentication.
